overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character walking through a dense forest environment with dynamic lighting and detailed vegetation. The character passes through a narrow rock corridor with a fallen log overhead, discovers a fallen body on the ground, and continues along the winding dirt path.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail with rock outcroppings approaching narrow passage

events.description: entering narrow rock corridor with fallen log spanning overhead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along forest path toward rock formation with tall trees on both sides

entered.detail: tall straight pine trees with rough bark lining the forest path
large boulders covered in green moss flanking the trail
large fallen tree trunk spanning across the path between rock walls
tall vertical rock walls forming a narrow passage

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a sun-dappled forest with tall pine trees and mossy rock formations. The path narrows as it approaches a rock corridor with a fallen log spanning overhead, creating a natural archway.

scene_state.functional_zone: open forest clearing with scattered rocks

events.description: exiting rock corridor into more open forest area

agents.ego_description: continuing along forest path away from rock formation into clearer area

entered.detail: smaller rocks and boulders scattered along the forest floor
more open area with less dense tree cover ahead

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the rock corridor, the character enters a more open forest clearing. The overhead log and rock walls fall behind as the path continues through scattered rocks and tall pines.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest area with fallen logs and deceased figure

events.description: discovering a fallen body lying on the ground near fallen logs

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing a fallen body lying on the right side of the path

notable_agents.action: fallen body lying face down on the forest floor wearing dark clothing

entered.detail: large decaying tree trunks fallen across the forest floor
tall green grass growing alongside the dirt path

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a fallen body lying on the forest floor near some large fallen logs. After passing the body, the character continues along the path bordered by tall grass patches.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest with tall grass and rock walls

agents.ego_description: walking through denser forest vegetation with tall grass on both sides

entered.detail: vertical rock face covered in moss and vegetation

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the forest, the character walks along a path bordered by tall grass and moss-covered rock walls. The dense tree canopy creates a sheltered environment as the journey continues.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through a sun-dappled pine forest that transitions from a narrow rock corridor into a sheltered, densely wooded path. It begins with the character walking past mossy rock formations and tall pines, moving toward a natural archway formed by a fallen log spanning a narrow corridor. As the character emerges from this rocky passage, the environment opens into a clearing of scattered stones and towering trees. The scene then shifts as the camera approaches a fallen body lying near large logs on the forest floor, before continuing along a trail bordered by patches of tall grass. Finally, the path narrows again, winding between moss-covered rock walls under a dense tree canopy that creates a secluded, sheltered atmosphere.
